task_updates.executor_notes: Verified `TimelineCanvas` now carries `isPinned` into positioned shot groups, renders suggested groups with dashed lighter overlays, keeps pinned groups solid with the stronger existing color-mix treatment, and keeps pinned shot labels visible without hover. Validation passed in the full `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` module and the production build.

Verified pinned-group drag expansion happens only after the drag threshold is crossed, and pinned group `trackId` stays synchronized in the same edit across grouped rows moves, grouped config/new-track moves, and `moveClipToRow()` track moves. Validation passed in the full drag, track-management, and multi-drag test modules plus the production build.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed suggested groups render with dashed borders and lighter `color-mix` overlays, pinned groups remain solid with the stronger existing `color-mix` treatment, and pinned shot names stay visible without hover in `TimelineCanvas`.

Confirmed pinned-group expansion is deferred until the first pointer move past the drag threshold, and pinned group `trackId` is updated in the same edit across all required move paths: rows multi-drag, config/new-track multi-drag, and `moveClipToRow()`.
